news.t: OneAscent Launches Small Cap ETF, Bolstering its Suite of Values-Aligned, Index-Based Solutions

holdings.infoBox: OAIM is an equity ETF with a total of 47 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cash & Cash Equivalents stock at 6.16%, SK hynix at 5.23%, ASML Holding at 4.73%, UOL Group at 4.55%, and HSBC Holdings at 4.47%.

overview.description: The OneAscent International Equity ETF (OAIM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively invests in an equity portfolio of large- and mid-cap non-US companies. The fund combines an ESG screening methodology with its fundamental investment process OAIM was launched on Sep 15, 2022 and is issued by Oneascent.

data.title: OneAscent Launches Small Cap ETF, Bolstering its Suite of Values-Aligned, Index-Based Solutions
data.text: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. , June 13, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- OneAscent Investment Solutions is proud to announce the latest addition to its suite of values-aligned investment offerings: the OneAscent Small Cap Co...
